Contains content of Delta metadata files.

It is safe to truncate or drop this table at any time.

Columns:

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `hostname` ([LowCardinality(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/lowcardinality)) — Hostname of the server executing the query.
- `event_date` ([Date](/sql-reference/data-types/date)) — Date of the entry.
- `event_time` ([DateTime](/sql-reference/data-types/datetime)) — Event time.
- `query_id` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Query id.
- `table_path` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Table path.
- `file_path` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — File path.
- `content` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Content in a JSON format.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
